stories.text: As a project manager, I want to assign tasks to team members so that work is distributed evenly.
As a developer, I want to filter tasks by status and priority so that I can focus on what matters most.

ground_truth.action: filter tasks by status and priority

stories.text: As an admin, I want to export project data to CSV so that I can share reports with stakeholders.
As a QA engineer, I want to link test cases to tasks so that test coverage is tracked per feature.

ground_truth.goal: test coverage is tracked per feature

stories.text: As a team lead, I want to create task templates for recurring workflows so that sprint setup is faster.

ground_truth.action: create task templates for recurring workflows

stories.text: I need to be able to drag and drop tasks between columns on the board.

ground_truth.action: drag and drop tasks between columns

stories.note: Informal — no As a / so that

stories.text: The system should send email notifications when a task is overdue.

ground_truth.action: send email notifications when a task is overdue
ground_truth.goal: users are alerted about missed deadlines

stories.text: As a product owner, I want to set sprint goals and track velocity over time so that I can forecast delivery dates and communicate progress to executive stakeholders during quarterly business reviews.

ground_truth.action: set sprint goals and track velocity over time
ground_truth.goal: forecast delivery dates and communicate progress to executive stakeholders

stories.text: As a new hire, I want an onboarding checklist that auto-assigns orientation tasks so that I know what to complete in my first week.

ground_truth.action: get an onboarding checklist that auto-assigns orientation tasks
ground_truth.goal: know what to complete in first week

stories.text: As a developer and code reviewer, I want to add comments to tasks and tag colleagues so that discussions are centralized and searchable.

ground_truth.action: add comments to tasks and tag colleagues

stories.text: As a user, I want to integrate TaskFlow with Slack, GitHub, and Jira so that notifications and updates sync across tools.

ground_truth.action: integrate TaskFlow with Slack, GitHub, and Jira
ground_truth.goal: notifications and updates sync across tools

stories.text: As a security auditor, I want to view an audit log of all task modifications with timestamps and user IDs so that compliance requirements are met.

ground_truth.action: view an audit log of all task modifications with timestamps and user IDs

stories.text: As a remote team member working across time zones, I want to set my availability hours and have the system adjust deadline notifications to my local time so that I receive alerts during my working hours and not at 3 AM.

ground_truth.action: set availability hours and have deadline notifications adjusted to local time
